lastSavedSummaries: GitHub Action permission for Pinned (AI can't disable Pinned's CI guard by editing the workflow)
GitHub Action permission to add new pins (AI can't strip Pinned's ability to grow on each PR)
AI-coder rules in CLAUDE.md (AI can't silently delete the rules that tell it to respect pins + read .pinned/ai-lessons.md)
no `VITE_*` env var leaks a secret to the client bundle
Lockfile changes can't sneak past package.json bumps (catches AI regenerating the lockfile and silently shifting transitive deps)
lastLessonSummary: Do not weaken pinned tests to make CI pass.
